card.description: The U.S. Department of Homeland Security is highlighting the worst of worst criminal aliens arrested by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).
card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: Arrested: Worst of the Worst | Homeland Security

tweets.text:
Every day, our @ICEgov law enforcement officers are out on the street arresting criminal illegal aliens.

Yesterday, these brave men and women arrested murderers, child rapists, cocaine traffickers, and other despicable criminals.

Find these criminals and more of the WORST OF THE WORST arrested: https://t.co/sAd4TQTdFA

author.description: With honor and integrity, we will safeguard the American people, our homeland, and our values. #WeAreDHS

tweets.text:
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA: A criminal illegal alien arrested by @HSILosAngeles for producing and possessing child pornography has been SENTENCED to 50 years in prison.

The illegal alien, Angel Emilio Rodriguez-Marroquin from Guatemala, featured his own 8-year-old nephew and 8-year-old niece with SPECIAL NEEDS in some of the child pornography he produced.

Thanks to our @ICEgov law enforcement officers, this CREEP is behind bars — and, after he serves his time, he will be REMOVED from our country.
